description: Analyze the human Huntingtin (HTT) mRNA sequence (~/UGENE_Data/huntington/HTT_mRNA.gb) to identify tandem repeats, focusing on the pathogenic CAG trinucleotide repeat in exon 1. Use a minimum period of 3 bp for the analysis. Save the annotated sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/huntington/results/HTT_annotated.gb and export the detected tandem repeats to ~/UGENE_Data/huntington/results/repeat_table.txt. Generate a clinical significance report at ~/UGENE_Data/huntington/results/clinical_report.txt documenting the CAG repeat location, the 3 bp period, the CAG motif, and an explanation of the clinical significance of CAG repeat length in Huntington's disease.
